ops.title: retrofit cc-notes adoption into pre-repo-bootstrap repos (cc-sentiment; cc-skills done)
ops.description:
Round-5 investigation (2026-07-05) into why repo-bootstrap never wired cc-notes into cc-skills concluded: the repo predates the tool. cc-skills was founded 2026-06-05 (10a5358, hand-authored, no AGENTS.md/STYLEGUIDE.md ever); the repo-bootstrap plugin was added to cc-skills the next day (b6b2851, 2026-06-06 — cc-skills authored the tool, was not scaffolded by it); cc-notes support inside repo-bootstrap landed 2026-06-18 (eb96e75), gated on `command -v cc-notes` in d835c49 (2026-06-21). Nothing to fix in the skill — the conditional behaved correctly and was never invoked against this repo.

A ~16-repo sweep found exactly one other repo with the identical gap: **cc-sentiment** (founded 2026-04-12, 55ce650, own hand-rolled monorepo scaffold — has AGENTS.md but zero cc-notes refspec adoption). Every other checked repo (cc-context, cc-review, cc-present, cc-transcript, cc-squash, cc-steer, cc-merge, cc-orchestrate, cc-pane, cc-runtime, cc-factory, cookie-sync, fusekit, synckit, captain-hook) was founded 2026-06-09+ and has proper adoption.

## Plan (narrow two-repo retrofit — no skill fix, no broader sweep)

1. ~~cc-skills~~ — DONE in round 5: init side effects on main as 9bbc597 (cc-notes plugin in .claude/settings.json + [packs.cc-notes] in .claude/hooks/packs.toml); refspecs self-adopted in the primary clone when task 2939d87 was filed. No reconcile CI workflow: the repo has no .github/ and default init correctly skips it ("everything the repo is ready for").
2. cc-sentiment: same recipe — tree-changing init side effects via a throwaway clone of origin (the primary working copy may belong to parallel sessions; never dirty it), commit, push to the default branch; refspec/config parts in the primary via `cc-notes init`'s config-only effects or first task-command self-adoption. Match what eb96e75/d835c49 describe: settings.json plugin registration (if .claude/ exists), packs.toml entry, refspecs, reconcile workflow only if .github/ exists.
3. Verify per repo: `git ls-remote origin 'refs/cc-notes*'` non-empty after first sync; `git config --get-all remote.origin.fetch` includes the cc-notes-sync refspec in the primary.

ops.text: cc-sentiment: init tree side effects committed and pushed to its default branch via an isolated clone
cc-sentiment: refs/cc-notes* visible on origin after first sync and refspec present in the primary clone's config
